Booking Change Voluntary (VOL) — SIT Miro gap analysis

118 SIT test cases checked against Booking Change Voluntary (VOL) (Miro). 4 candidate gaps · 0 high. Intent, full chat & expected results taken from each test case; alignment is heuristic — confirm against the canvas.

GLOB-11End Flowcore76
DBaaS/SPDBaaS & Service-Proxy backend assertionsbranch42
📝 Booking Change Voluntary (VOL) — gaps the test authors already flagged in the workbook (12)
1Customer is checked-in on any segment → blocked for voluntary change; must check out first — NEGATIVE — Check-in gating
2Customer is checked-in → exits flow → checks out → retries change successfully — POSITIVE — Check-in recovery
3Customer is checked-in on only 1 segment → entire PNR still blocked — EDGE — Check-in consistency
4Rebooked PNR → System incorrectly references original itinerary instead of updated one — NEGATIVE — Rebooking alignment
5Booking source inconsistency (AC vs modified externally) → user attempts change — EDGE — Source validation
6Booking started in chatbot → user abandons → resumes → eligibility not re-triggered incorrectly — POSITIVE — Session continuity
7User switches intent mid-flow (Change → Upgrade → Change again) → system maintains valid state — EDGE — Flow switching
8Multi-bound booking → user changes one bound → system ensures correct bound-level processing — POSITIVE — Bound-level logic
9Fare allows change but no inventory available → user forced to reselect — NEGATIVE — Inventory mismatch
10Pricing changes between selection and confirmation → system enforces reprice before confirmation — NEGATIVE — Dynamic pricing
11Booking split before voluntary change → system validates correct PNR context post-split — EDGE — PNR split
12Refund (lower fare) after rebooked itinerary → correct refund calculated on updated itinerary — EDGE — Rebook + refund interaction
Eligible / Happy — 6 test cases

Eligible Higher Fare Flight Change — Date/Time, Single Pax, Payment

CONVERSATION ENTRY (GLOB-01)
⚙️ The booking is AC 761 YUL→YVR on 20-Jun-2026, Flex fare, ACB source
⚙️ The booking has no SSRs, no checked baggage, passenger is not checked in
🤖
Hello! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?
Selects English
👤
🤖
Please note that by using this service, you will interact with an automated chatbot which uses AI to answer your questions and requests. Your personal information will be used to identify and authenticate you, to answer your request, and for other purposes detailed in the Privacy Notice.
🤖
How can I help you today?
I'd like to reschedule my flight to Vancouver.
👤

LEGAL DISCLAIMER (GenUC-24 — Booking Change)
🤖
Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process. To process your request, you'll need your booking reference and the full name associated to the booking. Depending on the changes you select, payment may be required. Please have access to your preferred method of payment. Would you like to get started?
Sarah accepts the disclaimer
👤
IDENTIFICATION (GenUC-01)
🤖
I can definitely help you with that. To start I'll just need to know some information to be able to process your request and identify you.
🤖
Please provide your full name exactly as it appears on your ticket, including any middle names if applicable.
Sarah Chen
👤
🤖
Thanks, Sarah! And, what is your booking reference number?

ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02)
⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
🤖
Rule 1: Departure time → PASS (within 72h window)
🤖
Rule 2: Ticket status → PASS (014-stock, valid coupon)
🤖
Rule 3: Check-in → PASS (not ACCEPTED)
🤖
Rule 4: Booking source → PASS (ACB)
🤖
Rule 5: SSR restrictions → PASS (no blocking SSRs)
🤖
Rule 6: eUpgrade → PASS (no EUPG)
🤖
Rule 7: Fare eligibility → PASS (Flex, not Basic)
🤖
Rule 8: OAL segments → PASS (AC-only)
🤖
All rules pass → isBoundEligible=true, triggerType=VOLUNTARY
ELIGIBILITY (BC-02) → BCVol-02 → BCVol-03
🤖
ES Rules 1–8 PASS (no baggage, no SSRs) → VOL Eligible

• Keep my flight
Change my flight

ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02) — ALL 8 RULES EVALUATED
⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
🤖
Rule 1 (RULE_72HR_WINDOW): Departure at T+48h → PASS (within 72h window)
🤖
Rule 2 (RULE_TICKET_STATUS): 014-stock ticket, valid coupon → PASS
🤖
Rule 3 (RULE_CHECKIN_STATUS): acceptance.status ≠ ACCEPTED → PASS (not checked in)
🤖
Rule 4 (RULE_BOOKING_SOURCE): Source = ACB → PASS
🤖
Rule 5 (RULE_SSR_RESTRICTIONS): No blocking SSRs (PETC, UNMR, etc.) → PASS
🤖
Rule 6 (RULE_EUPGRADE): No EUPG segments → PASS
🤖
Rule 7 (RULE_FARE_ELIGIBILITY): Flex fare (not Basic/TAWRBA) → PASS
🤖
Rule 8 (RULE_OAL_SEGMENTS): AC-only, no OAL segments → PASS
🤖
All 8 rules pass → isBoundEligible=true, triggerType=VOLUNTARY

👤 I'd like to change my flight
🗺️ Canonical Miro path — coverage (Booking Change Voluntary (VOL))
✓ asserted · ✗ required-by-Miro but missing · · not applicable
✗ GLOB-01✓ Intent Recog· GLOB-19✗ GenUC-24✓ GenUC-01✗ GenUC-05✗ GenUC-08✗ BC-02· BC-02 branch· BCVol-02· BCVol-03· BCVol-04✓ BCVol-05· BCVol-06/07✓ BCVol-08✓ BCVol-09· BCCab-04· GLOB-16✗ GLOB-11✓ DBaaS/SP
⚠️ Gap analysis vs Miro
✅ No divergences detected against the Miro flow (heuristic — confirm against the canvas).
💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case
STEP FUNCTION START
🤖
SessionId sess-12345 intent voluntary_start_search arguments pnr ACLJN9 origin YYZ destination YVR date 2026-06-26
⚙️ VolStart Lambda validates request parameters
⚙️ DynamoDB session cache created: sessionId=sess-12345, ExpirationTime=now+2h
⚙️ Step Function execution started: dbaas-rebooking-vol-<env>
⚙️ STATE 1: GET BOOKING DETAILS
🤖
SF enters Get Booking Details state
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync Get Booking Details API with PNR ACLJN9
⚙️ AppSync returns booking data → manageReservationSessionId extracted
⚙️ State GET_BOOKING_DETAILS status SUCCESS
⚙️ DynamoDB updated: NextActions=[voluntary_search_flights]
⚙️ STATE 2: SEARCH FLIGHTS (LFS)
🤖
SF enters LFS (Low Fare Search) state
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync LFS API with origin/destination/date
⚙️ AppSync returns flight options
⚙️ Kafka message published: flight options payload
⚙️ DynamoDB updated: NextActions=[voluntary_create_cart]
⚙️ STATE 3: CREATE CART
SF enters Create Cart state (after user selects flight via Agentic → SP resume)
👤
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync Create Cart API with selected flight + fare
⚙️ AppSync returns: cartId extracted, errors[] is empty
⚙️ State CREATE_CART cartId cart-67890
⚙️ DynamoDB updated: NextActions=[voluntary_get_seat_map]
⚙️ STATES 4-7: SEAT MAP, MANAGE SEATS, TO QUOTES, MANAGE TO
🤖
SF enters Get Seat Map state
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync Seat Map API → seat options returned → Kafka published
SF enters Manage Seats state (after user selects seat or skips)
👤
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync Manage Seats API → seat confirmed → Kafka published
🤖
SF enters TO Quotes state
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync Travel Options Quotes API → ancillary options returned → Kafka published
SF enters Manage TO state (after user selects ancillaries or skips)
👤
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync Manage Travel Options API → confirmed → Kafka published
⚙️ STATE 8: PAYMENT LINK
🤖
SF enters Payment Link state
🤖
Lambda generates JWT deeplink for payment
⚙️ State PAYMENT_LINK deeplink <jwt-url>
⚙️ DynamoDB updated: NextActions=[voluntary_purchase_complete]
⚙️ STATE 9: PURCHASE COMPLETE
🤖
SF enters Purchase Complete state (after payment confirmation via SNS)
🤖
Lambda processes purchase confirmation
⚙️ PurchaseCompleted
⚙️ State PURCHASE_COMPLETE status SUCCESS
⚙️ DynamoDB updated: TaskToken=null, NextActions=null (session complete)
⚙️ SF transitions to terminal success state
✅ Expected results from test case
📋 Test data / preconditions
- sessionId:sess-12345· PNR:ACLJN9· Eligible for vol change
- All eligibility rules PASS · SP routes to DBaaS Vol Step Function
- All AppSync APIs respond successfully (no failures)

New: YYZ → YUL, 28-Jun-2026

SP routes PUT /voluntary/start with new sessionId
NEW EXECUTION
⚙️ VolStart Lambda creates new DynamoDB record: sess-route-change-v2
⚙️ New SF execution started with new session
⚙️ Old DynamoDB record (sess-route-change) remains terminated
⚙️ No cross-contamination between old and new sessions
✅ Expected results from test case
📋 Test data / preconditions
- sessionId:sess-route-change· Previous cart creation failed (V-67 scenario)
- User changes origin/destination/date after the cart failure
- Agentic must create a new session — cannot reuse the failed session

CCE CHANNEL IDENTIFICATION
⚙️ Vol flow is triggered from CCE channel (not web/mobile Agentic)
⚙️ Channel header identifies request as CCE
CREDENTIAL VERIFICATION — ALL APPSYNC CALLS
SF processes through all states for PNR CC4R9K
👤
🤖
State 1 (Get Booking Details): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials (not Agentic OID)
🤖
State 2 (LFS): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
🤖
State 3 (Create Cart): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
🤖
State 4 (Seat Map): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
🤖
State 5 (Manage Seats): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
🤖
State 6 (TO Quotes): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
🤖
State 7 (Manage TO): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
🤖
State 8 (Payment Link): AppSync call uses CCE OID + credentials
VERIFICATION
🤖
All 8 AppSync calls contain CCE-specific Authorization header
🤖
None of the calls use Agentic web/mobile OID
🤖
Flow completes successfully with CCE credentials throughout
✅ Expected results from test case
📋 Test data / preconditions
- Channel:CCE(Contact Centre Experience) — distinct from web/mobile Agentic channel
- PNR:CC4R9K· Eligible for vol change
- CCE channel requires separate OID (OAuth Identity) credentials for all AppSync calls

INITIAL START REQUEST (ALREADY COMPLETED)

⚙️ SP performed eligibility pre-check at start time → isBoundEligible=true
⚙️ SF is running, waiting at voluntary_create_cart callback
RESUME REQUEST
🤖
Headers: Authorization: Bearer <valid-jwt>, x-agentic-session-id: sess-resume-001
🤖
Intent voluntaryCreateCart sessionId sess-resume-001 arguments selectedFlight AC409 fareClass Flex
SP ROUTING — PRE-CHECK SKIPPED
🤖
SP does NOT query Trip Tracer (no PNR lookup)
⚙️ SP does NOT call Eligibility Service (no pre-check)
⚙️ SP translates intent: voluntaryCreateCart → voluntary_create_cart
⚙️ SP forwards request directly to Vol API endpoint
RESPONSE
🤖
SP returns HTTP 202 (Accepted)
🤖
VolResume Lambda receives the request
🤖
SF continues from Create Cart state

⚙️ Date/time reflects the timestamp of the change (not the flight date)
⚙️ Timezone is the local timezone of the processing system

API REQUEST
🤖
Headers: Authorization: Bearer <valid-jwt>, x-agentic-session-id: <valid-session>
🤖
Intent voluntaryStartSearch orderId AV8R2L lastName Petrova
SP ELIGIBILITY PRE-CHECK
🤖
Queries Trip Tracer with PNR AV8R2L + lastName Petrova → PNR FOUND
⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
⚙️ ES evaluates Rule 4 (RULE_BOOKING_SOURCE): ACV → FAIL
⚙️ IsBoundEligible=false
SP GATE — REQUEST BLOCKED
🤖
Request is NOT forwarded to DBaaS Vol API
🤖
NO Step Function is started
⚙️ NO DynamoDB session is created
🤖
EligibilityStatus NotEligible isBoundEligible failedRule RULE_BOOKING_SOURCE reasonCode ACV_INELIGIBLE

📋 Test data / preconditions
- PNR:AV8R2L· Booking source:ACV(ineligible for self-serve)

👤
Clicks the expired deeplink after timeout
👤
🤖
The web portal calls AppSync GraphQL endpoint to verify deeplink session

The Verify Deeplink Session lambda decodes the JWT

⚙️ Invalid Session
🤖
SystemService: validatePurchaseLink · systemErrorMessage: Invalid session
🤖
Deeplink is no longer valid — no cart data returned
END FLOW
🤖
Must restart the booking change flow to generate a new deeplink

ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02) — RULE 1 BOUNDARY TEST
⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
🤖
Rule 1 (RULE_72HR_WINDOW): Departure at T+72h15m → PASS (within 15-minute grace buffer; threshold is 72h + 15min grace)
🤖
Rule 2 (RULE_TICKET_STATUS): 014-stock → PASS
🤖
Rule 3 (RULE_CHECKIN_STATUS): Not checked in → PASS
🤖
Rule 4 (RULE_BOOKING_SOURCE): Source = ACB → PASS
🤖
Rule 5 (RULE_SSR_RESTRICTIONS): No blocking SSRs → PASS
🤖
Rule 6 (RULE_EUPGRADE): No EUPG → PASS
🤖
Rule 7 (RULE_FARE_ELIGIBILITY): Flex fare → PASS
🤖
Rule 8 (RULE_OAL_SEGMENTS): AC-only → PASS
🤖
All 8 rules pass → isBoundEligible=true, triggerType=VOLUNTARY

⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
• Flight AC 773 status: CANCELLED / DISRUPTED
• Disruption type active on segment
• Original trigger: VOLUNTARY (user-initiated booking change)
• Reclassified trigger: INVOLUNTARY (disrupted PNR)

🤖

✗ GLOB-01· Intent Recog· GLOB-19✗ GenUC-24✗ GenUC-01✗ GenUC-05✗ GenUC-08✗ BC-02· BC-02 branch· BCVol-02· BCVol-03· BCVol-04· BCVol-05· BCVol-06/07· BCVol-08· BCVol-09· BCCab-04· GLOB-16✗ GLOB-11✓ DBaaS/SP

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case
PRECONDITION: SF AT LFS STATE
⚙️ Active session sess-timeout-001 at voluntary_search_flights state
⚙️ SF execution waiting at LFS callback
APPSYNC TIMEOUT
⚙️ Lambda calls AppSync LFS API
🤖
AppSync response takes >31 seconds
🤖
Lambda timeout fires at 31s — request aborted
RETRY LOGIC (3 ATTEMPTS)
🤖
Attempt 1: AppSync call → timeout at 31s → FAIL
🤖
Attempt 2: AppSync call → timeout at 31s → FAIL
🤖
Attempt 3: AppSync call → timeout at 31s → FAIL
🤖
Total retry duration: ~93 seconds (3 × 31s)
ERROR HANDLER (AFTER 3 TIMEOUTS)
🤖
DynamoDB updated: TaskToken=null, FlowVariables=null, NextActions=null
⚙️ State LFS status ERROR error TIMEOUT
⚙️ SF receives SendTaskFailure
⚙️ SF transitions to error terminal state
🤖
Displays error message to user
✅ Expected results from test case
📋 Test data / preconditions
- sessionId:sess-timeout-001· Active session · SF at LFS (Low Fare Search) state
- AppSync LFS API responds but takes>31 seconds(exceeds Lambda timeout threshold)
- Simulates slow backend response under load or network latency

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case
PRECONDITION: SESSION STARTED
⚙️ Session sess-idle-001 was started at T=0 (e.g., 10:00 AM)
⚙️ DynamoDB ExpirationTime set to T+2h (12:00 PM)
⚙️ SF is waiting at voluntary_create_cart callback
Was at flight selection step before going idle
👤
RETURNS AFTER 2+ HOURS
👤
Returns at T+2h15m (12:15 PM) and attempts to continue
👤
🤖
POST /booking-change intent=voluntaryCreateCart, sessionId=sess-idle-001
SESSION EXPIRY CHECK
🤖
SP forwards to VolResume Lambda
⚙️ Lambda reads DynamoDB record for sess-idle-001
⚙️ Checks ExpirationTime (12:00 PM) against current time (12:15 PM)
⚙️ ExpirationTime is in the past → session expired
🤖
Error session id does not exit or expired
🤖
Must restart the entire flow from GLOB-01
CHATBOT RESPONSE
🤖
Informs the user that the session has expired
🤖
Is redirected to restart the booking change flow

📋 Test data / preconditions
- sessionId:sess-idle-001· Session started at T=0
- User goes idle for>2 hours(exceeds DynamoDB ExpirationTime TTL)

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case
CONCURRENT REQUESTS
🤖
SessionId sess-A intent voluntary_start_search arguments orderId ACLJN9
🤖
SessionId sess-B intent voluntary_start_search arguments orderId ACLJN9
DYNAMODB CONDITIONAL WRITE
🤖
ConditionExpression: attribute_not_exists(sessionId)
RACE CONDITION HANDLING
🤖
DynamoDB PutItem succeeds (no existing record)
🤖
SF execution sf-exec-A started
🤖
HTTP 202 returned to Request A
🤖
DynamoDB PutItem fails: ConditionalCheckFailedException (record already exists from A)
⚙️ Lambda detects existing active session for same PNR
⚙️ Lambda follows reset path: SendTaskSuccess(isResetRequest=true) on A's TaskToken
⚙️ SF execution sf-exec-A terminated
⚙️ New DynamoDB PutItem for sess-B → new SF execution sf-exec-B started
FINAL STATE
🤖
Only one active SF execution exists (sf-exec-B)
⚙️ DynamoDB contains only sess-B record
⚙️ No duplicate executions running for same PNR

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case
CONVERSATION ENTRY (GLOB-01)
🤖
Hello! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?
Selects English
👤
🤖
Please note that by using this service, you will interact with an automated chatbot which uses AI to answer your questions and requests. Your personal information will be used to identify and authenticate you, to answer your request, and for other purposes detailed in the Privacy Notice.
🤖
How can I help you today?
I want to change my flight
👤
⚙️ Identifies booking change intent
LEGAL DISCLAIMER (GenUC-24 — Booking Change)
🤖
Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process. To process your request, you'll need your booking reference and the full name associated to the booking. Depending on the changes you select, payment may be required. Please have access to your preferred method of payment. Would you like to get started?
Janet accepts the disclaimer
👤
IDENTIFICATION (GenUC-01)
🤖
I can definitely help you with that. To start I'll just need to know some information to be able to process your request and identify you.
🤖
Please provide your full name exactly as it appears on your ticket, including any middle names if applicable.
Janet Moore
👤
🤖
Thanks, Janet! And, what is your booking reference number?
FF8L2K
👤
⚙️ Searches Trip Tracer for PNR FF8L2K
⚙️ Trip Tracer returns: PNR FOUND (Auth Flow 1)
AUTHENTICATION (GenUC-05)
🤖
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll do this by sending a one-time verification code to either your email or phone number on file. Where would you like to receive it?
• Email: j***@gmail.com
• Phone: +1***471
Email: j***@gmail.com
👤
🤖
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it.
294718
👤
⚙️ Validates the OTP code → CORRECT (attempt 1 of 5)
🤖
Your verification was successful. Let's proceed to the next step.
JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)
🤖
I found the following journey: • Flight: AC 891 • Route: Toronto (YYZ) → Vancouver (YVR) • Date: June 20, 2026 Is this the journey you'd like to check?
Yes
👤
ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02) — RULE 2 FAIL
⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
🤖
Rule 1 (RULE_72HR_WINDOW): Flight already departed → FAIL — OUTSIDE_72HR_WINDOW
🤖
Rules 2–8: NOT evaluated (fail-fast)
🤖
IsBoundEligible=false
INELIGIBLE — FULLY FLOWN
🤖
Displays ineligible message
🤖
No change possible — all coupons have been used (status: FLOWN)
END FLOW (GLOB-11)
🤖
Is there anything else I can help you with?
No
👤
🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.
✅ Expected results from test case
📋 Test data / preconditions
- Passenger:Janet Moore· PNR:FF8L2K
- Single seg: AC 891 YYZ → YVR, Jun 20 (past) · All coupons status:FLOWN
- Passenger has already completed the trip

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case
INITIAL SESSION (T=0)
⚙️ Ryan O'Brien started a booking change for PNR SC7N4K at T=0
⚙️ Completed: GLOB-01 → GenUC-24 → GenUC-01 → GenUC-05 → GenUC-08 → BC-02 (PASS) → BCVol-02 → BCVol-03
⚙️ Eligibility was evaluated and passed at BC-02
⚙️ SF is at voluntary_search_flights state (BCVol-06)
⚙️ DynamoDB session: active, ExpirationTime=T+2h
USER ABANDONS SESSION
Ryan closes the browser at T+15m
👤
End session
👤
⚙️ DynamoDB session remains active (TTL not expired)
USER RESUMES (T+30m)
⚙️ Agentic detects existing active session for PNR SC7N4K
🤖
Sends resume request to SP with existing sessionId
🤖
SP forwards to VolResume Lambda
⚙️ Lambda reads DynamoDB: session active, ExpirationTime in future
RESUME VALIDATION
🤖
Eligibility is NOT re-triggered (already passed at BC-02)
⚙️ Authentication is NOT re-triggered (already passed at GenUC-05)
⚙️ Continues from where they left off
⚙️ LFS results are refreshed (new search, not stale cached results)
FLOW COMPLETION
🤖
Ryan selects a flight and completes the booking change
🤖
Ticket reissued successfully
END FLOW (GLOB-11)
🤖
Is there anything else I can help you with?

⚙️ Sophie opens chatbot, completes GLOB-01 → GenUC-24 → GenUC-01 → GenUC-05 → GenUC-08 → BC-02 (PASS)
⚙️ INTENT 1: CHANGE (BCVol-02)
🤖
Asks intent at BCVol-02
Change my flight
👤
🤖
The flow proceeds to BCVol-03 (date/time selection)
INTENT SWITCH: USER GOES BACK TO UPGRADE
Actually, I'd like to upgrade instead
👤
⚙️ Recognizes intent change to Upgrade

⚙️ DynamoDB session updated: FlowVariables cleared for Change state
🤖
Would you like a Paid Upgrade, Bid Upgrade, or E-Upgrade?
INTENT SWITCH AGAIN: BACK TO CHANGE
Never mind, let me just change the date instead
👤

⚙️ Resets upgrade flow state
⚙️ DynamoDB session updated again
⚙️ The flow returns to BCVol-03 (date/time selection)
STATE VALIDATION
🤖
Only one active SF execution exists (no orphaned executions from switches)

⚙️ No stale Upgrade state persists in session

PRECONDITION: PNR SPLIT COMPLETED

⚙️ NOT the original PNR (SP3M7R)

🤖
Change does NOT affect Lin Wei or Mei Wei on original PNR SP3M7R

Ana Costa
👤
🤖

RF9K2L

Selects email and provides the OTP code
👤

🤖

JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)
🤖
AC 893 YYZ → YVR, June 23, 2026
Confirms the journey
👤
ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02)
⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE
⚙️ Eligibility rules evaluated against rebooked itinerary (AC 893)
⚙️ All rules pass → isBoundEligible=true
INTENT SELECTION (BCVol-02)
Asks what the user would like to do
👤
Change my flight
👤
DATE SELECTION (BCVol-03)
🤖
Asks for new travel date
June 25, 2026
👤
LOW FARE SEARCH (BCVol-06)
🤖
Calls LFS (AppSync) for YYZ→YVR on 25-Jun-2026
🤖
AC 895 YYZ→YVR, 25-Jun-2026, $720 (lower than current $850)
🤖
Displays available flights with fare differences
Ana selects AC 895 ($720 — lower than current $850)
👤
CART CREATION (BCVol-07a) — REFUND CALCULATION
⚙️ Calls DBaaS Create Cart (voluntary_create_cart)
⚙️ DBaaS calls eRR for final pricing
🤖
Current fare (from rebooked itinerary AC 893): $850
🤖
New fare (AC 895): $720
🤖
Refund amount: $850 - $720 = $130
⚙️ Refund is calculated against the rebooked fare ($850), NOT the original fare ($850 in this case, but validated as referencing the correct itinerary)
SEAT SELECTION (BCVol-08a)
🤖
Displays available seats for AC 895
14C
👤
REFUND SUMMARY & CONFIRMATION (BCVol-09a/b)
🤖
Displays a message indicating the new flight details (AC 895 YYZ → YVR on June 25, 2026) and that a refund of $130.00 CAD will be issued
Ana confirms the change
👤
🤖
Refund of $130 is initiated
🤖
Refund references the rebooked itinerary fare (AC 893), not original (AC 891)
🤖
Ticket reissued for AC 895 at $720, seat 14C
⚙️ DynamoDB updated: TaskStatus=COMPLETED
⚙️ State PURCHASE_COMPLETE refundAmount baseFareSource REBOOKED_ITINERARY
⚙️ Confirmation email sent to Ana
POST-CHANGE VERIFICATION
🤖
New flight: AC 895 YYZ→YVR, Jun 25 at $720
🤖
Refund calculated from rebooked fare ($850), not original pre-rebook fare
⚙️ PNR UPDATED-CCT VOLUNTARY CHANGE

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


CONVERSATION ENTRY (GLOB-01)


🤖
Hello! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?


Selects English
👤


🤖
Please note that by using this service, you will interact with an automated chatbot which uses AI to answer your questions and requests. Your personal information will be used to identify and authenticate you, to answer your request, and for other purposes detailed in the Privacy Notice.


🤖
How can I help you today?


I want to change my flight
👤


⚙️ Identifies booking change intent


LEGAL DISCLAIMER (GenUC-24 — Booking Change)


🤖
Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process. To process your request, you'll need your booking reference and the full name associated to the booking. Depending on the changes you select, payment may be required. Please have access to your preferred method of payment. Would you like to get started?


Rosa accepts the disclaimer
👤


IDENTIFICATION (GenUC-01)


🤖
I can definitely help you with that. To start I'll just need to know some information to be able to process your request and identify you.


🤖
Please provide your full name exactly as it appears on your ticket, including any middle names if applicable.


Rosa Delgado
👤


🤖
Thanks, Rosa! And, what is your booking reference number?


RD6P3W
👤


⚙️ Searches Trip Tracer for PNR RD6P3W


⚙️ Trip Tracer returns: PNR FOUND (Auth Flow 1)


AUTHENTICATION (GenUC-05)


🤖
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll do this by sending a one-time verification code to either your email or phone number on file. Where would you like to receive it?


• Email: r***@gmail.com


• Phone: +1***814


Email: r***@gmail.com
👤


🤖
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it.


639281
👤


⚙️ Validates the OTP code → CORRECT (attempt 1 of 5)


🤖
Your verification was successful. Let's proceed to the next step.


JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)


🤖
I found the following journey: • Flight: AC 175 • Route: Toronto (YYZ) → Vancouver (YVR) • Date: June 24, 2026 Is this the journey you'd like to check?


Yes
👤


ELIGIBILITY → VOL ELIGIBLE
👤


🤖
BC-02: all 8 rules PASS → isBoundEligible=true


CHANGE TYPE — DOWNGRADE (BCCab-04)


🤖
What kind of change are you looking for?


Indicates they want to downgrade from Business to Economy
👤


⚙️ Detects downgrade intent → routes to BCCab-04


🤖
I'd need to transfer you to an agent who can assist with cabin changes. Would you like me to connect you?


• Yes · No


🤖
DECLINES LAH → FLOW ENDS


No
👤


🤖
Does NOT transfer to a live agent


🤖
No GLOB-16 (Live Agent Handoff) triggered

🤖

No
👤


🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.

🤖

🤖

Nadia Kovalenko
👤

👤


🤖
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it.

Yes
👤

• Cancel my flight


• Change my flight

• Keep my flight

👤

Edmonton
👤

• Edmonton International


• Either


YEG
👤


🤖

🤖

Clicks on Confirm
👤

Completes payment of CAD $220 on the external payment page
👤

END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖

• I would like you to — new flow · No


No
👤

Options: Travel options (e.g. Maple Leaf Lounge, Bistro vouchers) with per-passenger pricing


🤖
Skip Selection Submit


Skip Selection
👤


🤖

ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02) — RULE 3 FAIL ON SEG 2


⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE


🤖
Segment 1 (YYZ→YUL): Already flown — skipped


🤖
Rule 1 (RULE_72HR_WINDOW): T+4h → PASS


🤖
Rule 2 (RULE_TICKET_STATUS): 014-stock → PASS


🤖
Rule 3 (RULE_CHECKIN_STATUS): acceptance.status = ACCEPTED → FAIL — ALREADY_CHECKED_IN


🤖
Rules 4–8: NOT evaluated (fail-fast)


🤖
IsBoundEligible=false

FINAL CONFIRMATION & PAYMENT (BCVol-09a) — ATTEMPT 1


🤖
Great, to complete your rebooking, please complete your payment at the link below: please note that it will only be valid for the next 5 minutes.


🤖
Generates deeplink payment link ($200)


⚙️ DeeplinkSessionId created in DynamoDB · VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter = 0


Clicks the payment link
👤


🤖
Verifies deeplink JWT → valid


🤖
VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter incremented to 1


Payment fails at external portal (e.g. card declined)
👤


🤖
Returns to the chatbot


PAYMENT RETRY — ATTEMPT 2


🤖
Offers a retry payment link


🤖
Generates a new deeplink payment link ($200)


🤖
Deeplink validity: 5 minutes


Clicks the retry payment link
👤


🤖
Verifies deeplink JWT → valid


🤖
VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter incremented to 2 (max allowed per CHAI-2969)


Payment succeeds on second attempt
👤


🤖
Your ticket has been re-issued. You should receive an email confirmation shortly.


END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖

No
👤


🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.

RE-BOOKING CONFIRMATION (BCVol-09)
👤


🤖
Here's your updated itinerary:


🤖
Displays New Itinerary Comp: Trip Summary (full PNR)


🤖
Here's a breakdown summary of the charges for your new itinerary:


🤖
Charge breakdown displayed


🤖
Checks: Is cash payment required? → YES ($195)


PAYMENT REQUEST (BCVol-09a) — ATTEMPT 1


🤖
Proceed to payment


⚙️ Deeplink JWT created · DeeplinkSessionId stored in DynamoDB Deeplink Session Cache Table


⚙️ VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter = 0


Proceed to payment
👤


🤖
Calls AppSync to verify deeplink session


⚙️ DynamoDB UpdateItem: VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter incremented to 1


⚙️ Condition check: counter NOT greater than 1 → PASS


Payment fails at external portal (card declined)
👤


🤖
Returns to the chatbot


PAYMENT RETRY (BCVol-09a) — ATTEMPT 2


🤖
Offers a retry payment link


Proceed to payment
👤


⚙️ DynamoDB UpdateItem: VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter incremented to 2


⚙️ Condition check: counter NOT greater than 1 → PASS (counter = 2, limit is configurable env var)


Payment fails again at external portal
👤


🤖
Returns to the chatbot


🤖
PAYMENT ATTEMPT 3 — COUNTER EXCEEDED


Proceed to payment
👤


⚙️ DynamoDB UpdateItem attempts to increment VerifyDeeplinkSessionCounter to 3


⚙️ Condition check FAILS: counter is greater than 1 (configurable limit exceeded)


⚙️ DynamoDB throws ConditionalCheckFailedException


⚙️ Error mapped per CHAI-2969 schema and returned


⚙️ No cart data returned — payment link no longer valid


END FLOW


🤖
Must restart the booking change flow to generate a new deeplink session

- Flight change confirmed · Payment deeplink generated · User has already used "Proceed to payment" twice (counter = 2)

JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)


🤖
I found the following journey: • Flight: AC 305 • Route: Toronto (YYZ) → Montreal (YUL) • Date: June 30, 2026 Is this the journey you'd like to check?


Yes
👤


ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02) — FAIL-FAST BEHAVIOR


⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE


🤖
Rule 1 (RULE_72HR_WINDOW): Departure at T+96h → FAIL — OUTSIDE_72HR_WINDOW


🤖
Rules 2–8: NOT evaluated (fail-fast — first failing rule stops evaluation)


🤖
IsBoundEligible=false


🤖
ES response contains ONLY Rule 1 failure reason


🤖
Rule 2 (220-stock), Rule 4 (ACV), Rule 5 (PETC) failures are NOT reported


VERIFICATION: ONLY ONE FAILURE RETURNED


🤖
EligibilityStatus NotEligible failedRule RULE_72HR_WINDOW reasonCode OUTSIDE_72HR_WINDOW


🤖
Response does NOT contain: RULE_TICKET_STATUS, RULE_BOOKING_SOURCE, or RULE_SSR_RESTRICTIONS failures


🤖
Only 1 failure reason is returned (not 4)


INELIGIBLE MESSAGE


🤖
Displays the ineligible message corresponding to Rule 1 failure


END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖

No
👤


🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.

- Multiple rules would fail: Rule 1 (72h), Rule 2 (ticket stock), Rule 4 (ACV), Rule 5 (PETC)
- Only Rule 1 failure should be reported due to fail-fast behavior

👤

SHOW ME OTHER FLIGHTS
👤

👤

🤖

Date/Time
👤


Show me something for Tuesday instead
👤

🤖

🤖

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


PRECONDITION: CHECK-OUT COMPLETED


⚙️ David Park was previously checked in on AC 123 YYZ→YUL


⚙️ David checked out via the Air Canada app


⚙️ Check-in status is now: NOT CHECKED IN


CONVERSATION ENTRY (GLOB-01)


🤖
Displays greeting (GLOB-01)


Selects English and accepts the alert
👤


I want to change my flight
👤


⚙️ Identifies booking change intent


⚙️ LEGAL DISCLAIMER → IDENTIFICATION → AUTHENTICATION


🤖
Displays legal disclaimer (GenUC-24)


David Park CK1N8P
👤


⚙️ Trip Tracer returns: PNR FOUND


🤖
Completes OTP authentication successfully


JOURNEY SELECTION (GenUC-08)


🤖
Displays journey: AC 123 YYZ→YUL, Jun 25


Confirms the journey
👤


ELIGIBILITY CHECK (BC-02) — PASS AFTER CHECK-OUT


⚙️ Calls Eligibility Service with eligibilityType=BOOKING_CHANGE


⚙️ The Eligibility Service detects passenger is NOT checked in


⚙️ All eligibility rules pass


⚙️ IsBoundEligible=true


VOLUNTARY FLOW (BCVol-02 → BCVol-09b)


🤖
Proceeds to BCVol-02: intent selection


Change my flight
👤


🤖
The flow continues through BCVol-03 → BCVol-05a → BCVol-06 → BCVol-07a


Selects AC 125 YYZ→YUL on 27-Jun-2026 (+$85)
👤


Completes seat selection and payment ($85)
👤


🤖
Ticket is reissued and confirmation displayed


END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖
Is there anything else I can help you with?


No
👤


🤖
Thank you for choosing Air Canada.

💬 Test-case chat transcript from test case


⚙️ CONVERSATION ENTRY → ELIGIBILITY (GLOB-01 → BC-02)


⚙️ Outbound: AC 301 YYZ→YVR, Jun 25


⚙️ Return: AC 302 YVR→YYZ, Jun 30


⚙️ Liam opens chatbot, completes GLOB-01 → GenUC-24 → GenUC-01 → GenUC-05 → GenUC-08 → BC-02 (PASS)


INTENT & BOUND SELECTION (BCVol-02 → BCVol-03)


Change my flight
👤


🤖
Which part of your journey would you like to change?


🤖
Displays: Outbound (AC 301, Jun 25) / Return (AC 302, Jun 30) / Both


Outbound
👤


BOUND-LEVEL PROCESSING VALIDATION


🤖
LFS searches for YYZ→YVR alternatives only


🤖
Return bound (AC 302 YVR→YYZ, Jun 30) is marked as Keep


🤖
Keep bound is NOT sent to LFS (no search for return alternatives)


⚙️ Outbound Change return Keep


FLIGHT SELECTION & COMPLETION


Liam selects new outbound: AC 303 YYZ→YVR, Jun 27 (+$45)
👤


🤖
Fare difference calculated for outbound change only


🤖
Return fare is NOT included in the price difference


🤖
Payment of $45 processed


🤖
Ticket reissued with: outbound=AC 303 (new), return=AC 302 (unchanged)


POST-CHANGE VERIFICATION


🤖
Outbound: AC 303 YYZ→YVR, Jun 27 (changed)


🤖
Return: AC 302 YVR→YYZ, Jun 30 (unchanged, original booking preserved)


⚙️ DynamoDB reflects both bounds correctly


END FLOW (GLOB-11)


🤖
Is there anything else I can help you with?

FLIGHT SELECTED AT DISPLAYED PRICE


Hiroshi selects AC 147 with displayed fare difference of +$120
👤


CART CREATION (BCVol-07a) — PRICE CHANGE DETECTED


⚙️ Calls DBaaS Create Cart (voluntary_create_cart)


⚙️ DBaaS calls eRR for final pricing


⚙️ ERR returns updated fare: +$155 (price increased since LFS result)


⚙️ Fare difference detected: displayed $120 vs actual $155


REPRICE NOTIFICATION


Displays a message indicating that the price for the selected flight has changed since it was displayed, showing the updated fare difference ($155 instead of $120), and asking whether the user would like to continue with the updated price or select a different flight
👤


USER ACCEPTS NEW PRICE


Hiroshi selects to accept the new price
👤


SEAT SELECTION (BCVol-08a)


🤖
Displays available seats for AC 147


8A
👤


PAYMENT (BCVol-09a)


🤖
Fare difference: $155 (not the originally displayed $120)


🤖
Payment deeplink generated for $155


Hiroshi completes payment via deeplink
👤


🤖
Payment confirmed: $155 CAD


TICKET REISSUE (BCVol-09b)


🤖
Ticket reissued for AC 147 YOW→YYZ, 29-Jun-2026, seat 8A
